entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS456) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD ETHERNET ACCESS&PORT PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2335.02E.
2. TO ADD CORRECTION TO CSDES PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2351.01S.
3. TO ADD WIRELINE SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2377.01E.
4. TO ADD WIRELINE SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2378.01E.
5. TO REDUCE SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2385.01P.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS457) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD ACCESS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2326.04E.
2. TO ADD PREMISE WIRE PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2327.01E.
3. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2338.01E.
4. TO ADD DEDICATED ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2345.01E
5. TO ADD MWLANS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2380.01E.
6. TO ADD CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICE PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2382.01E.
7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

3. ADDITION OF WCS FEATURE CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2342.01E.
4. ADDITION OF T3 ACCESS CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2347.01E.
5. ADDITION OF PRICE REDUCTION CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2374.01P.
6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS459) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2340.01E.
2. TO ADD ETHERNET REVISED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2350.01S.
3. TO ADD EMC SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2384.01E.
4. TO ADD CISCO AND RIVERBED SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2391.01E.
5. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS460) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2343.01E.
2. TO ADD DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2354.01E.
3. TO ADD ICB CCS FEATURES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2381.01E.
4. TO ADD FOUR (4) EMC WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2396.01E.
5. TO UPDATES THE SED DMRC CLIN RELATIONSHIP TABLE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2400.01S.
6. TO ADD ACCESS FOR SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2355.01E.
7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION
SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ADDITION OF NSC PRICING TO DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2352.01E. 4. ADDITION OF ICB CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT UNDER CLIN 769013, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2373.01E.
